string.text:
The SIG MCX is a family of firearms designed and manufactured by SIG Sauer, which features a short-stroke gas piston system to reduce recoil and improve the reliability of the weapon based on the design of the earlier SIG MPX. It features a system that enables conversion between 5.56?45mm NATO, .300 AAC Blackout, and 7.62?39mm ammunition, though it is designed to deliver optimal performance with .300 AAC Blackout and an optional suppressor.
 The SIG MCX VIRTUS is the second generation of the SIG MCX series and was introduced in 2017. This is the model chambered in .300 ACC Blackout.
 %c[0,255,255,255]PROPERTIES:
 %c[d_cyan] • %c[0,255,255,255]Origin: %c[ui_gray_1]Germany
 %c[d_cyan] • %c[0,255,255,255]Manufacturer: %c[ui_gray_1]SIG Sauer
 %c[d_cyan] • %c[0,255,255,255]Production Year: %c[ui_gray_1]2015

The SIG MCX is a family of firearms designed and manufactured by SIG Sauer, which features a short-stroke gas piston system to reduce recoil and improve the reliability of the weapon based on the design of the earlier SIG MPX. It features a system that enables conversion between 5.56?45mm NATO, .300 AAC Blackout, and 7.62?39mm ammunition, though it is designed to deliver optimal performance with .300 AAC Blackout and an optional suppressor.
 The SIG MCX RATTLER is a short-barreled variant chambered in .300 AAC Blackout and 5.56, intended to serve as a personal defense weapon. This is the model chambered in .300 ACC Blackout.
 %c[0,255,255,255]PROPERTIES:
 %c[d_cyan] • %c[0,255,255,255]Origin: %c[ui_gray_1]Germany
 %c[d_cyan] • %c[0,255,255,255]Manufacturer: %c[ui_gray_1]SIG Sauer
 %c[d_cyan] • %c[0,255,255,255]Production Year: %c[ui_gray_1]2015

The SIG MCX is a family of firearms designed and manufactured by SIG Sauer, which features a short-stroke gas piston system to reduce recoil and improve the reliability of the weapon based on the design of the earlier SIG MPX. It features a system that enables conversion between 5.56?45mm NATO, .300 AAC Blackout, and 7.62?39mm ammunition, though it is designed to deliver optimal performance with .300 AAC Blackout and an optional suppressor.
 The SIG MCX-SPEAR LT is a carbine and the third generation of the SIG MCX line, introduced in 2022. It is derived from the MCX-SPEAR rifle instead of the Virtus line. This is the model chambered in .300 ACC Blackout.
 %c[0,255,255,255]PROPERTIES:
 %c[d_cyan] • %c[0,255,255,255]Origin: %c[ui_gray_1]Germany
 %c[d_cyan] • %c[0,255,255,255]Manufacturer: %c[ui_gray_1]SIG Sauer
 %c[d_cyan] • %c[0,255,255,255]Production Year: %c[ui_gray_1]2022
